name: consensus_score
description: Tanh-transformed quality-weighted consensus probability across the 7 sub-models. Recommended threshold: 0.822.

name: general_single_point
description: Probability from sub-model trained on single-point activity measurements aggregated across 3 ChEMBL assays (n=500). Recommended threshold: 0.823.

name: general_dose_response
description: Probability from sub-model trained on dose-response measurements aggregated across 5 ChEMBL assays (n=7205). Recommended threshold: 0.522.

name: general_mic90
description: Probability from sub-model trained on MIC90 measurements aggregated across 103 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=228). Recommended threshold: 0.607.

name: general_mic
description: Probability from sub-model trained on MIC measurements aggregated across 1258 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=6801). Recommended threshold: 0.507.

name: general_ic50_decoys
description: Probability from sub-model trained on IC50 measurements aggregated across 41 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=880 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.853.

name: merged_mic_decoys_a
description: Probability from sub-model trained on MIC measurements merged across 8 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=1360 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.835.

name: merged_mic_decoys_b
description: Probability from sub-model trained on MIC measurements merged across 4 ChEMBL assays (cutoff 10 uM; n=830 incl. decoys). Recommended threshold: 0.822.
